brief_notes: Comprehensive atlas study mapping 87 brain regions with PRV152 tracing. Tables provide quantitative neuron counts with SEMs, ANOVA results, and post-hoc comparisons. The validation experiments (negative controls, IML confirmation) are well presented. The comparison with prior bone marrow tracing adds context. Main weakness is the small sample size (n=4 after exclusions) and the inherently descriptive nature of the study, though the quantitative ranking of brain regions by infection density is valuable.
